generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor delivering the motor current I_M sampled as time‑series data points."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorMountedEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft providing encoder positions sampled as time‑series."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorMountedEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder after the gearbox providing output angle sampled as time‑series."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (DataTransmitted)
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorMountedEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountedEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current I_M time‑series used for torque calculation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor shaft position from the motor‑mounted encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorMountedEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angle from the gearbox secondary encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MqttEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers (tooling and enablers)
instance MqttEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data transport via MQTT messages streaming sensor data to the digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService,
                     FrictionParameterIdentificationService,
                     FrictionModelGenerationService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation and calculation performed with MATLAB/Simulink."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterIdentificationService,
                     FrictionModelGenerationService
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engineering models created with SysML block definition and internal block diagrams."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization on a unified dashboard."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance FrictionModelGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of refined friction models that are fed back to the robot controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustMotionControlAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operators can monitor torque, velocity and friction parameter evolution live."
]

instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified friction parameters enable adjustment of motion control algorithms."
]

instance AdjustMotionControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Feed refined friction models back to the robot controller to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C10: Models / DataCalculation
instance SysMLMotorBlockModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition diagram of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLGearboxBlockModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition diagram of the gearwheel and cycloidal gearboxes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionFreeDrivetrainModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the friction‑free drivetrain used as baseline."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink analytical model implementing Coulomb‑Viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink analytical model implementing Stribeck friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink analytical model implementing Dahl friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink analytical model implementing LuGre friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DataCalculation model deriving torque τ from measured current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance VelocityDerivationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DataCalculation model deriving angular velocity ω from encoder position differences."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Data acquisition and model computation are performed continuously in real‑time during robot operation, enabling online friction identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of the physical asset (first axis), its associated Sensors (encoders, current), the Asset Administration Shell that encapsulates metadata, Processing components that consume measured DataTraces and apply Simulation models to produce derived DataTraces, and the Dashboard service that presents results to users."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is instantiated for the operational stage of the robot and is continuously updated during runtime to reflect wear and changing conditions; the underlying engineering models were created during design."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "All generated DataPoints are traceable to their originating Processing component and input DataTraces, providing end‑to‑end traceability that supports verification of model fidelity and validation of identified friction parameters."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are published from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol; the shadow consumes these MQTT topics to build its DataTraces."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The implementation follows the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) specification for Industry 4.0, employs SysML as a modeling standard, and uses the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) as defined in cited literature."
]
